programmes.show_description: This channel is currently off air.
Alan Quinlan sits down with Joe Molloy to look back at his Ireland career having won 27 caps over a 9 year period. (HD)
The second and concluding part of an interview with the Derry legend, who discusses his colourful football career and the place GAA has in society. (HD)
On your marks, get set, quiz! Hosted by Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene, and based on the nostalgic horse-racing fairground game, five players battle it out on an iconic racetrack set. (HD)
Paul O'Grady returns to South Africa, Zambia and Namibia on the trail of young orphaned animals (HD)
The day-to-day activity of the UCD Veterinary Hospital as they attempt to restore movement to a French Bulldog's back legs and care for a wild seal with a damaged eye. (HD)
A teenager is brought into the Royal having fallen from a cliff, but it soon emerges that the incident was a suicide attempt as evidence of extreme depression comes to the surface. (HD)
A hunting expedition ends in tragedy, and staff at the Royal persuade a devout Catholic mother to be sterilised - much to the disgust of her priest. (HD)
Growing up in The Troubles in south Armagh, Oisin McConville became a local legend as he recovered from a missed penalty to score the winning goal in their only All-Ireland win. (HD)
